---
title: "PSA Figures"
output: html_document
date: "2023-09-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
load("MAT2_LHS")
load("MAT2LEN")

```

```{r}
PSADATA<-bind_rows(as.data.frame(MAT2P3), as.data.frame(MAT2))
colnames(PSADATA)<-c("Qalys", "Costs", "PREP")
PSADATA<-as_tibble(PSADATA)
PSADATA<-PSADATA%>%filter(Qalys!="NaN" | Costs!="NaN")
PSADATA[,1:2]<-lapply(PSADATA[,1:2],as.numeric)
#PSADATA
#PSADATA$PREP<-chartr("CBV", "CAB", PSADATA$PREP)
#for (i in 1:nrow(PSADATA)) {if(PSADATA$PREP[i]=="PREP-TDF") #PSADATA$PREP[i]<-"PREP-TDx"}
```

```{r}

g<-ggplot(PSADATA, aes(Qalys, Costs, color=PREP))+
  geom_point(alpha=0.4, size=1)+
  theme_classic()+
  #ylim(-1000000000,100000000000)+
  #xlim(-1000000000,100000000000)+
  #geom_abline(slope=25128, intercept=0)+
  #geom_hline(yintercept =0)+
  #geom_vline(xintercept =0)+
  scale_x_log10()+
  scale_y_log10()+
  ylab("Costs in 2023 €")+
  xlab("Qalys")+
  ggtitle("Cost-effectiveness plane")+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))
  
g
```

```{r}
############
PSADATA1<-cbind(MAT2P3[,1:2], MAT2[,1:2])
PSADATA1<-apply(PSADATA1, 2, as.numeric)
colnames(PSADATA1)<-c("QalysLEN", "CostsLEN", "Qalys", "Costs")
PSADATA1<-as_tibble(PSADATA1)
PSADATA1<-PSADATA1%>%mutate(AQalys=QalysLEN-Qalys, 
                      ACosts=CostsLEN-Costs,   
                      ICERS_LEN=(ACosts)/(AQalys))
                    
```
```{r}
x_label_pos <- max(PSADATA1$AQalys, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.72

g <- ggplot(PSADATA1, aes(AQalys, ACosts)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1, color = "red") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey40") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey40") +
  geom_abline(slope = 21865.5,  intercept = 0, color = "black",     linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_abline(slope = 33895.59, intercept = 0, color = "red",       linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_abline(slope = 45130.1,  intercept = 0, color = "blue",      linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_abline(slope = 128678.2, intercept = 0, color = "gold",      linetype = "dotted") +
  annotate("text", x = x_label_pos, y = 21865.5  * x_label_pos, label = "Croatia",    hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = x_label_pos, y = 33895.59 * x_label_pos, label = "Spain",      hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "red") +
  annotate("text", x = x_label_pos, y = 45130.1  * x_label_pos, label = "Euro Zone",  hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "blue") +
  annotate("text", x = x_label_pos, y = 128678.2 * x_label_pos, label = "Luxembourg", hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "goldenrod3") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Cost-effectiveness plane",
    x     = "Incremental QALYs",
    y     = "Incremental costs (2023 €)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

g
```
```{r}
# CEAC using net monetary benefit (NMB) approach.
# For each WTP threshold λ: P(CE) = proportion of simulations where
# NMB = λ·ΔQalys − ΔCosts > 0.
# Using stat_ecdf(ICERS_LEN) is incorrect when ΔQalys can be negative,
# because the ICER sign flips and the ECDF no longer maps to P(cost-effective).

wtp_seq <- seq(-100000, 150000, by = 500)

ceac <- tibble(
  wtp  = wtp_seq,
  p_ce = sapply(wtp_seq, function(lambda) {
    mean(lambda * PSADATA1$AQalys - PSADATA1$ACosts > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  })
)

g1 <- ggplot(ceac, aes(x = wtp, y = p_ce)) +
  geom_line(color = "red", linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 21865.5,  color = "black",     linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 33895.59, color = "red",       linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 45130.1,  color = "blue",      linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 128678.2, color = "gold",      linetype = "dotted") +
  annotate("text", x = 21865.5,  y = 0.02, label = "Croatia",    angle = 90, hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 33895.59, y = 0.02, label = "Spain",      angle = 90, hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "red") +
  annotate("text", x = 45130.1,  y = 0.02, label = "Euro Zone",  angle = 90, hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "blue") +
  annotate("text", x = 128678.2, y = 0.02, label = "Luxembourg", angle = 90, hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "goldenrod3") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Cost-effectiveness acceptability curve",
    x     = "Willingness to pay (2023 €/QALY)",
    y     = "Probability cost-effective"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

g1

###############
```
```{r}
tiff("CEAC_Lancet_HIV.tiff", width=8, height=8, units="in", res=300)
g1
dev.off
```


```{r}
tiff("PSA_Lancet_HIV.tiff", width=12, height=8, units="in", res=300)
g#plot_grid(g,g1, ncol=1, labels=c("A", "B"))
dev.off
```

```{r}
combined<-plot_grid(g, g1, nrow=2, labels=c("A","B"))
combined
```

```{r}
tiff("Combined_Lancet_HIV.tiff", width=12, height=8, units="in", res=300)
combined
dev.off
```
